title: crotalaria verdcourtii
intro: Crotalaria verdcourtii, also known as the Verdcourt's rattle pod, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, characterized by its yellow flowers and seed pods that rattle when ripe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation, due to its high content of alkaloids like verdcourtine and crotaline. The health benefits of Crotalaria verdcourtii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, typically made by steeping the dried leaves or seeds in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
